content: I will replace the static coupon verification in `CheckoutPage.tsx` with dynamic Supabase checking.

args.Description: "Update handleApplyCoupon in CheckoutPage.tsx to fetch and validate coupons from Supabase."
args.Instruction: "Replace handleApplyCoupon with async validation querying Supabase website_store_coupons and website_store_coupon_redemptions"
